pages.title: Austin Bookkeeping Partner For Founder-Led Service Businesses
pages.description: Monthly bookkeeping, cleanup, and QuickBooks support for Austin owners who need clear numbers and fewer surprises.

sections.title: Bookkeeping You Can Actually Run The Business On
sections.content: AccuraBooks helps Austin service-business owners get clean books, reliable monthly reporting, and QuickBooks-backed visibility without hiring in-house accounting staff.

sections.title: Why Local Owners Trust AccuraBooks
sections.content: Operating since 2008. Local coverage across Austin, Round Rock, and Georgetown. Led by David Kuzak with accounting and operator experience.

sections.title: Revenue-Ready Bookkeeping Service Buckets
sections.content: 1) Monthly bookkeeping and reconciliations. 2) Cleanup and catch-up projects. 3) QuickBooks setup, migration, and support for owners and small teams.

sections.title: Client Proof Snapshot
sections.content: Named proof includes CareerPlug, Nulo, Farmshare Austin, Titan Siding & Windows, FXfit, Masterbind USA, Austin Mobile Drug Testing, and Design 88.

sections.title: Book A 15-Minute Bookkeeping Review
sections.content: Bring your current bookkeeping process and we will identify the highest-impact fix for monthly reporting confidence.
